enrichment method: Tryptic digests were subjected to TiO2 enrichment.
fractionation method: phosphopeptides were fractionated offline by SCX chromatography
fragmentation method: MS-analysis was performed using a LTQ-Orbitrap Velos (CID mode) or a Q-Exactive (HCD mode)
instrument: MS-analysis was performed using a LTQ-Orbitrap Velos (CID mode) or a Q-Exactive (HCD mode)
ionization type: analyzed on a reverse-phase nano-HPLC-MS system coupled with an electrospray ionization interface
labeling: we designed a quantitative proteomics strategy based on SILAC MS-labeling
